subject: WM-0050 review: changes_requested
body: High: denied sleep interruption mutates RestJobDriverStore terminalReason without a terminal transition; High: RestSleepReason accepts ReservationReason and arbitrary strings but encode/decode drops them to rest.none, breaking structured terminal reasons and snapshot round-trips; Medium: tickRecovery mutates JobCore/recovery progress before NeedStore denial, so invalid actor recovery leaves partial progress with reservations still active.
